About Organization

MPPSC is a government organization responsible for conducting exams and selecting candidates for various government posts in Madhya Pradesh. The organization aims to provide a fair and transparent selection process.
The MPPSC is committed to providing equal opportunities to all candidates and ensuring that the selection process is free from bias.

About the Programme

The MPPSC Assistant Town Planner programme is a government job opportunity for candidates who want to work in urban planning. The programme aims to provide a chance for candidates to work with the Madhya Pradesh Public Service Commission and contribute to the state's urban development.
The programme is open to Indian citizens who meet the eligibility criteria, and the selection process will be based on a competitive exam.
